creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #2)
The point I tried to make is that this isn't a java/openjdk11 ports problem.

AFAIS the issue should be assigned to
Product: Base System
Component: kern
Assignee: freebsd-emulation

As I think the issue is about running a Linux application (/compat/linux/android-studio/jre/bin/java) on the Linux Emulator.

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/linuxemu/
https://wiki.freebsd.org/Linuxulator

As nothing happened in two years I'm reassigning the issue in the hope it will get the proper traction.
